RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: 1.Added Alignment signals in C2 core of STLA FLR4 and corrected timing info
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-4282 [STLA_SCALE1] Decoder changes required for vehicle data, timing info c1,c2, Alignment data
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.Known_Issues: 1.logs which starts with cal running count 0 and cal source 0 for first scan index of the log wrong statement printing ---> ex: [ In scan_Index = 5899 duplicate cal_source found = 0 ] : need to handle this. 2.with third command line argument option in docker run one error is printing need to handle this but results are as expected 3.AUTERA logs extraction will fail if CCA library is set to 1 in xml.

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: 1.Added Alignment signals in C2 core of STLA SRR6P.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-4286 [STLA_SCALE1] Add alignment signals to the decoder and extractor tool for C2 core

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: 1.CYW-4092[MUDP] Detection values in xml Dump is not proper for STLA FLR4P 2.CYW-4091[MUDP] CSV File do not have scan index Info for STLA FLR4P 3.CYW-4090[MUDP]MUDP crashes on xml Dump of Honda SIL Resim MF4 4.CYW-4089[MUDP]Xml Dump tracker data not correct for STLA FLR4P 5.CYW-4096[MUDP]Missing Track Info in xml for HONDA_SRR6+_FUSION_20231006_HOND_SW8.1DCFUS_C1_004 6.CYW-4097[MUDP]Crash Observed on xml dump of HONDA_SRR6+_FUSION_20231006_HOND_SW8.1DCFUS_C1_004_r00080300.mf4

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: 1. f_list_gen.py added to MUDP extractor tool folder. script required to generate list of file paths in jenkins job run.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.Known_Issues: 1.logs which starts with cal running count 0 and cal source 0 for first scan index of the log wrong statement printing ---> ex: [ In scan_Index = 5899 duplicate cal_source found = 0 ] : need to handle this. 2.with third command line argument option in docker run one error is printing need to handle this but results are as expected 3.AUTERA logs extraction will fail if CCA library is set to 1 in xml.

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: Option enabled to get only detailed info and to get only packetloss statistics
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-1144::[MUDP_Extractor]: Print statements for good log and condition check for Detailed info printing

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: overall summery table added at end of packet loss report

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-1039 :[MUDP Extractor]: Change Input file list from txt file to Json file

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.ChangeLog_Details: cca_library issue in creating packetloss reports is fixed and Removed negative timestamp to check Async BiT
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: CYW-1095:[MUDP Extractor] : Fix issue for async counter and not to consider negative timestamp to check Async Bit.
RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.Known_Issues: logs which starts with cal running count 0 and cal source 0 for first scan index of the log wrong statement printing ---> ex: [ In scan_Index = 5899 duplicate cal_source found = 0 ] : need to handle this.

RELEASE_DESCRIPTION.JIRA_Tickets: - CYW-993: Calib issue observed in Radars when running multiple logs

- CYW-763:MUDP Extractor -> XML file [Create Single XML File for all Radars /ECU ] - CYW-720:Update MUDP Extractor tool / Packet Loss Report to Calculate KPI Errors for Probe Time Sync Error (PLP TS) - CYW-801:Update Tests for RECU Calibration Stream - Resim SIL Engine - CYW-800:Update Tests for RECU Calibration Stream - Packet loss Tool

- CYW-730: RECU MUDP Extractor -> XML file Windows - CYW-447: MUDP Extractor / Packet Loss Tool - Shall work in Continuous mode Across files. - CYW-715: MUDP Extractor tool to take Packet loss / Extraction /Both XML file – Linux - CYW-607:MUDP extractor Create Embedded Lib UDP XML files - HIL Port Data (Wireshark) - CYW-605:MUDP extractor Create Embedded Lib UDP XML files - ORCAS Input

- CYW-438:Test completely the PACKET LOSS tool for all error case. - CYW-462: Implement Read operation using Vigem lib in MUDP Extractor Tool. - CYW-494: SourceTXn Count drop should be handled in the packet loss tool
- CYW-15: Packet Loss Reporting to be ported to Extractor tool.
